title: Fix virtual interface member trigger convergence (#5116)

features.name: virtual interface with logic member in class
features.description: Code should include a class that has a virtual interface member with a logic vector sub-member, where the class task writes to that virtual interface member

features.name: cross-interface assign with virtual interface access
features.description: Code should include assign statements connecting interface member data to top-level wires, combined with virtual interface assignments and writes in an initial block with timing delays

features.name: virtual interface member write causing combinational loop
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface member write inside a task, where the interface member is connected to a combinational signal via assign statements that would cause a convergence loop
